document.title: Letter of Request for extension of Technical documents supplementation period

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co., Ltd. requests an extension of the supplementation period for CE MDDR Technical Documents 1st review items.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports tracking of a request to extend the technical documentation supplementation period after the first notified body assessment.
keyPoints: Technical Documentation Assessment Report No. MDR199_2023 is referenced.
The 1st NB assessment date is August 31, 2023.
The deadline for request for supplemental extension is October 31, 2023.
The request is to extend the supplementary period for further review of the common part with the Clinical Evaluation supplement.
The letter is signed by Yunhee Kim, President, on behalf of H&abyz Co., Ltd.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: On behalf of H&abyz Co., Ltd.

concepts.name: Technical documents supplementation period extension
concepts.evidence: We request the extension of the complementary period as follows for the supplementary items of the CE MDDR Technical Documents 1st review.

concepts.name: Technical Documentation Assessment Report MDR199_2023
concepts.evidence: TECHNICAL DOCUMENTATION ASSESSMENT REPORT NO. MDR199_2023

concepts.name: Clinical Evaluation supplement
concepts.evidence: Request to extend the supplementary period for further review of the common part with the Clinical Evaluation supplement.

reviewFlags.reason: Product models are not stated in the source text.
Authority signal metadata says MFDS/domestic, but the source text addresses 3EC International a.s. as NB No. 2265 in the Slovak Republic.
